name: peerd
desc: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A browser extension that runs a full agent loop where you already work: it drives your tabs, spins up sandbox…
descFull: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A browser extension that runs a full agent loop where you already work: it drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK, no backend, no telemetry.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: peerd – AI agent harness that runs entirely in your browser
